title: Property Consultant - Hiranandani Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Hiranandani Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
